title: BulletHitS2CPacket (S to C hit effects) + server hit broadcast
reference_files: C:/Users/GGxia/Desktop/YanbweMod/ModularShoot/设计文档.md#L2024-2036 (BulletHitS2CPacket design: bullet ID, hit position, hit type, hit entity ID, client effect playback)
acceptance_criteria: BulletHitS2CPacket record implements CustomPacketPayload with Codec + StreamCodec
Packet fields: bullet ID, hit position (Vec3), hit type (enum: ENTITY/BLOCK/PIERCE), hit entity ID (optional, -1 if not entity)
Server-side: hit event triggers BulletHitS2CPacket broadcast to players near hit position
Client handler: plays hit effects (particles/sound) based on hit type - no game state change (server already applied damage)
Packet registered in ModularShootPackets via PayloadRegistrar.playToClient
